title: chore(deps): bump rollup from 4.55.1 to 4.59.0 in /observability/_examples/otel-bridge/agent-hub
summary: Automated dependabot bump of rollup from 4.55.1 to 4.59.0 in the observability examples directory. The diff only modifies pnpm-lock.yaml, adding `libc` fields to rollup platform-specific package resolutions. The change is confined to an examples project, not a core package.
maintainerNotes: Low-risk lockfile-only change in an examples directory. CI is fully passing and there are no merge conflicts. Safe to merge as-is. No changeset is needed since this only affects an example project's lockfile.
